title: Senior Backend Developer
description: About Vispera As Vispera, we offer Image Recognition and Data Analytics-based retail execution and tracking services to the key players in the retail and FMCG industry. With our products Storesense and Shelfsight and our exquisite customer service, we provide our clients with perfect store solutions that radically change their way of running and monitoring their field operations. Why Us? We value and foster expert knowledge! We encourage ourselves for personal and professional growth! We listen to and try to understand each other at all times! We deeply believe in Do what you say, say what you do! Role Highlights: Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs. Build and optimize distributed systems and event-driven architectures. Work with event streaming and messaging technologies such as Apache Kafka and RabbitMQ. Design and maintain relational and NoSQL database solutions. Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. Participate in system design, architecture reviews, and technical decision-making. Monitor and improve application performance, reliability, and scalability Mentor junior engineers and contribute to engineering best practices. Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Product, Data, and Software. Unique Strengths You Bring to the Table: 7+ years of hands-on experience in backend software development. BSc in Computer Science or a related engineering field (MSc is preferred). Proficiency in strongly-typed programming languages such as Go, C# or Java. Experience with distributed event streaming platforms such as Apache Kafka or similar event log systems. Experience with message queue systems such as RabbitMQ. Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or Microsoft SQL Server. Experience with NoSQL databases and data structures such as MongoDB or Cassandra. Solid understanding of software architecture, distributed systems, and microservices. Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs or gRPC APIs. Familiarity with containerized environments and cloud-native applications. Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving capabilities. Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration skills. Strong ownership mindset with disciplined follow-up and attention to detail. Ability to work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining accuracy and clarity. Passion for being a part of a fast-growing BaaS company. Would Be Nice If You Have: Experience with Apache Spark or similar big data processing solutions. Experience with frontend frameworks such as React. Experience with Kubernetes and cloud platforms. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation. Knowledge of observability and monitoring tools. Have knowledge of ISO 27001:2022 and act as required by these systems. (*) (*): Vispera will provide relevant trainings, in case of a need if the personnel haven't got these trainings, after the recruitment within 3 months. Exclusive Perks Just for You: Hybrid Work Option: Remote-first culture with occasional in-office meetups when collaboration calls for it. Private Health Insurance: We've got your well-being covered! Meal Card: A special touch to spice up your day! Continuous Learning and Development Opportunities: Access to training programs with contracted companies. In-House Events and Team-Building Activities: Moments filled with collaboration and fun. At Vispera, we are committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Our recruitment process is free from bias and provides equal opportunities to all applicants, regardless of gender, nationality, ethnicity, religion, disability status, or any other personal characteristic.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Danışmanlığnı yaptığımız, yazılım alanında faaliyet gösteren bir müşterimizin, '' FullStack Engineer '' pozisyonunda arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Fullstack Engineer GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI Üniversitelerin 4 yıllık bölümlerinden mezun ( Lisans) 1- 4 yıl arası deneyim. Java/J2EE, Eclipse, Maven, Spring, Hibernate konusunda bilgi sahibi Microservis mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi, Ön yüz geliştirmeleri için React.js kütüphanesi hakkında bilgi sahibi Oracle veri tabanı, Sql Plsql konusunda bilgi sahibi Pozisyonda Full Remote olarak çalışılmaktadır. Projenin canlıya geçilme sürecinde Haftanın 2 günü Karaköy ofise gelinmesi beklenmektedir.
